title: Oxus
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Oxus''' was one of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] creditors. He was a fat and scarred [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] chief, and was called the "Terror of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outlands]]."

Oxus owned a [[TDF104]] crewed by Solo, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and [[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross Holdaack]]. Solo, hoping to capitalize on the reward of 2,000,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for taking [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Starkiller]] and his [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to [[Ogana Major]], faked a reactor overload and emptied the [[Starship/Legends|ship]]; Montross and Chewbacca were the only other crew members to remain on board when Solo blasted off.

==Behind the scenes==
"Oxus" is substituted for [[Clieg Whitsun]]'s surname in the first draft of the [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope''.]]

In the second draft of the film's script, entitled ''[[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars]]'', Oxus appeared as the creditor of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. He would be renamed and re-characterized as Jabba the Hutt in the [[The Star Wars: From The Adventures of Luke Starkiller|third draft]] of the original film.
